post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory plugins/hermes.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Confirm pyproject.toml project URLs point at the monorepo.
Confirm install.mjs does not embed local machine paths or non-public hostnames.
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
Verify lock-step plugin version still matches sibling plugins after monorepo workspace install.
notes: Hermes bundles a Python provider alongside the npm plugin. Python files migrate as part of plugin phase 1; the standalone @atomicmemory/python PyPI SDK decision is a separate phase 2 question. Reviewer must confirm tests/ fixtures do not embed real credentials.
